# Sendchamp
> Sendchamp is a cloud communication platform that provides SMS, Email, WhatsApp, Voice, and Verification APIs for businesses across Africa.

## AI Tooling
- [Sendchamp AI (GitHub)](https://github.com/sendchamp/ai): Official MCP server, Agent Skills, OpenAPI specs, and integration guides for AI coding assistants
- [Agent Skills](https://docs.sendchamp.com/ai/agent-skills): Install Sendchamp skills for Cursor, Claude Code, and Codex via skills.sh
- [MCP Server](https://docs.sendchamp.com/ai/mcp-server): Read-only docs MCP at mcp.sendchamp.com/docs for API search in your IDE
- [OpenAPI Spec (SMS + Verification)](https://github.com/sendchamp/ai/blob/main/openapi/sms-verification.yaml): Machine-readable API schema for SMS and OTP endpoints

## Marketing Site
- [Home](https://www.sendchamp.com/): Sendchamp marketing homepage
- [SMS API](https://www.sendchamp.com/sms): SMS messaging API for bulk and transactional SMS
- [Email API](https://www.sendchamp.com/email): Email delivery API for transactional and marketing emails
- [WhatsApp API](https://www.sendchamp.com/whatsapp): WhatsApp Business API for messaging and notifications
- [Voice API](https://www.sendchamp.com/voice): Voice call API for IVR and voice notifications
- [Verification API](https://www.sendchamp.com/verification): OTP and verification API for user authentication
- [Marketing Platform](https://www.sendchamp.com/marketing): No-code marketing campaign tools
- [Pricing](https://www.sendchamp.com/pricing): Sendchamp pricing for all channels
- [Use Cases](https://www.sendchamp.com/use-cases): Sendchamp use cases and industry solutions
- [About](https://www.sendchamp.com/about): About Sendchamp company and team
- [Customers](https://www.sendchamp.com/customers): Customer stories and case studies
- [Contact](https://www.sendchamp.com/contact): Contact Sendchamp sales and support

## Developer Docs
- [Guides](https://docs.sendchamp.com): Step-by-step guides for integrating Sendchamp APIs
- [API Reference](https://sendchamp.readme.io): Complete API reference documentation
- [Tutorials](https://developers.sendchamp.com/tutorials): Developer tutorials and walkthroughs
- [SDKs and Libraries](https://developers.sendchamp.com/libraries): Official SDKs and client libraries for Sendchamp APIs
- [API Simulator](https://simulator.sendchamp.com): Interactive API simulator for testing requests

## App
- [Dashboard Login](https://my.sendchamp.com/login): Sendchamp dashboard login for existing customers
- [Sign Up](https://my.sendchamp.com/signup): Create a free Sendchamp account

## Community and Resources
- [Blog](https://blog.sendchamp.com): Sendchamp product updates, engineering blog, and industry insights
- [Community Forum](https://community.sendchamp.com): Sendchamp community discussion forum
- [System Status](https://status.sendchamp.com): Sendchamp platform status and incident updates
- [Support Portal](https://support.go54.com/ticket/create): Submit a support ticket to the Sendchamp team
- [X / Twitter](https://twitter.com/sendchamp): Sendchamp on X (formerly Twitter)
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/sendchamp): Sendchamp on LinkedIn
- [Facebook](https://facebook.com/sendchamp): Sendchamp on Facebook
- [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/sendchamphq): Sendchamp on Instagram

## Legal
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.sendchamp.com/privacy): Sendchamp privacy policy
- [Terms of Service](https://www.sendchamp.com/terms-of-service): Sendchamp terms of service
